description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a rich, deep red fabric with a slightly textured appearance. The sofa features two individual seat cushions and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both of which appear plush and well-padded. The armrests are wide, rounded, and generously padded, with subtle decorative stitching along the front edges. The backrest is high and slightly contoured, providing ample support for the upper body. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs that are dark in color and only minimally visible. The overall design is inviting and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A plush, deep red two-seater sofa with wide, rounded armrests, a high backrest, and textured upholstery. It features two seat cushions and stands on short, blocky legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the high, slightly angled backrest.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two individual seat cushions, a continuous backrest, and both wide armrests with decorative stitching.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the armrest and the sofa's overall depth and padding.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous, high backrest and the sofa's solid, upholstered back.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two individual seat cushions and a single, continuous backrest cushion; all cushions appear attached and are uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded armrests that are fully padded and extend slightly above the seat height, featuring subtle decorative stitching along the front edge.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, dark in color, minimally visible, and likely made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a slightly contoured top edge, fully upholstered and padded, without visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red fabric with a subtle, irregular textured pattern; no visible decorative stitching except along the armrest fronts.
